ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a superuser */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "is_staff" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a staff member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Display name of the user */,
  "avatar" TEXT /* Path to the user's avatar image */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional verification */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth for personalization and age verification */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender for demographic analysis */,
  "language" TEXT /* User's preferred language for localization */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's timezone for accurate time-based notifications and activities */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code if the user was referred by another user */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., email, social media, direct) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is a default system permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_key" TEXT /* Unique session key */,
  "session_data" TEXT /* Serialized session data */,
  "expire_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, profile update) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was logged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, notification settings) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., system, promotional) */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Details of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was last updated */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_social_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media profile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the social link was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the social link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_social_links_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the address was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
